spec_match.rationale: Provides an excellent conceptual map for transform matrix immediates, accurately demonstrating the WGSL vertex shader calculations while utilizing a clean buffer fallback.

interactive.rationale: Brilliant interactivity, letting developers drag directly on the canvas to translate the rendered triangle, alongside fine-tuning sliders and a reset button.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Completely aligns with milestone concept listing.

edge_cases.rationale: Extremely robust edge case handling, maintaining cursor-grabbing state cues, restricting translation parameters inside safe canvas viewport boundaries, and delivering a matching Canvas 2D context fallback.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5199437611794432) to the 'see also' section.
